top.name: Chain Lightning
top.rules_text: Deal 5 damage to target. Chains to nearest enemy within 2 tiles for 4 then again for 2.

channel.name: Chain Lightning (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Each chain also imbues the target's tile with Storm

bottom.name: Wind Shear
bottom.rules_text: Push all enemies in a cone (3 wide 2 deep) 2 tiles backward. Deal 2 damage per tile pushed.

channel.name: Wind Shear (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Cone is 3 tiles deep instead
